breaking.title: Nineteen injured after bus overturns in Wales
breaking.summary: Police said the crash happened on the A484 near the Kidwelly roundabout in Carmarthenshire.

breaking.title: George Kurian resigns as Union Minister after RS tenure ends
breaking.summary: Senior BJP leader from Kerala steps down as BJP did not renominate him in the recent election to the Upper House; he was the only Christian Minister in the NDA govt.; his resignation sets off speculation of a Cabinet reshuffle

breaking.title: Dozens of Awami League activists arrested in Bangladesh as party marks founding anniversary defying ban
breaking.summary: Founded on June 23, 1949, when present-day Bangladesh was East Pakistan, the Awami League is the country's oldest political party and led the nation's 1971 Liberation War

breaking.title: Congo’s Ebola outbreak has most cases in first month of any African outbreak, WHO says
breaking.summary: The Bundibugyo outbreak in the Democratic Republic ‌of Congo that has infected over 1,000 people and killed 267 ‌was detected late and experts say ‌the ⁠virus had already been circulating ⁠for months before it was officially declared on May 15

breaking.title: Peter Murrell jailed for more than five years for embezzling SNP funds
breaking.summary: The former party chief executive had admitted embezzling more than £400,000 over a 12-year period.

breaking.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
breaking.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

breaking.title: Kerala High Court grants K. Sudhakaran time till July 8 to appear before it in person
breaking.summary: He had tendered an unconditional apology before the HC regarding his remarks about the HC Bench that quashed a single judge’s verdict on the murder case of Youth Congress leader S.P. Shuhaib

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE updates: India welcomes U.S.-Iran peace MoU, says Hormuz opening will boost energy supplies
breaking.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump says Iran agrees to 'highest level' nuclear inspections; Iran says won't allow UN inspectors at bombed nuclear sites
